notes: Swedish ARMOX 500 armor steel by SSAB. 500 HBW hardness. ~1.10x RHAe per mm vs AP threats per SSAB published ballistic test data. Good ballistic performance and weldability. Used in APCs, IFVs, and naval applications. EN 10294-2 compliant.

source.methodology: RHAe from SSAB published V50 ballistic limits vs AP threats, normalized to RHA thickness equivalence. Hardness per SSAB specification (500 HBW).
